case_title: GORDON YAMAGATA VS. GUANG D. CHEN

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAMAGATA, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, GUANG D.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, IS SET FOR SMALL CLAIMS -CALENDAR ON JAN-13-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. *(TIME OF HEARING ON THE CLAIM THAT WAS SERVED TO THE DEFENDANT WAS INCORRECT).*
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YAMAGATA, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, GUANG D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAITNIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAMAGATA, GORDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, GUANG D. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
